title: Phase 34a Compliance Fixes

changes.reason: Compliance requirement for correct test file location

changes.description: Added 4 property-based tests to reach 30% minimum coverage
changes.reason: Increase property-based test coverage from 19.4% to meet 30% requirement

changes.description: Added missing test categories to meet minimum requirements

tests: nested transaction failures without creating orphans
transaction timeout with mixed response states
very large number of parallel tool calls efficiently
complete workflow with branching logic and conditional tool calls
cascading failures in dependent tool chains gracefully
enforce state consistency across multiple rapid transitions
handle complex state validation during mixed operation types
handle malformed or corrupt tool response data gracefully
handle transactions with zero tool calls but valid assistant messages

changes.description: Enhanced HistoryService transaction stubs to return proper default values
improvements: commitTransaction now validates all tool calls have responses before committing
commitTransaction atomically adds assistant and tool messages to history
rollbackTransaction creates proper cancellation responses for all tool calls
rollbackTransaction preserves existing responses and creates cancellation for missing ones
Both methods now return proper default values instead of just logging warnings
changes.reason: Tests should fail on behavior, not on 'not yet implemented' errors

test_behavior.expected_failure_mode: Tests should FAIL on behavioral expectations, not on stub warnings
test_behavior.stub_quality: Enhanced stubs provide realistic default behavior for behavioral testing
test_behavior.validation: All tests include proper behavioral validation with @requirement, @scenario, @given, @when, @then comments

next_phase: Phase 35 - Full transaction implementation to make tests pass
